reasoning: Stub critic (autonomous run, 2026-05-25): apps/dashboard wizard step pages 1, 2, 5, 6, 7. The PR fills the per-step UI gap on top of the shell from PR #601. Every page is a thin Server-Component + 'use client' shim around an already-shipped @caia/* package — @caia/onboarding (Step 1), @caia/grand-idea (Step 2), @caia/business-proposal-generator (Step 5 server route via runStep5 + MemoryBlobStorage + MemoryProposalPersistence + ScriptedLlmCaller for the V1 wizard handler), @caia/design-ingest (Step 6 upload Dialog surface), @caia/atlas-ui + @caia/atlas-prompt-router (Step 7 split-screen + per-element prompt). Every visible UI primitive comes from @caia/ui (Card/Button/Input/Accordion/Dialog/Tabs/Form/Badge/Progress/ScrollArea/Sheet). FSM transitions are dispatched through the existing PATCH /api/wizard/[projectId]/state route from PR #601 using @caia/state-machine canTransition + the StateMachine constructor — no parallel FSM. GrandIdeaForm is mounted via @caia/grand-idea/ui-component without an additional shadcn wrapper because its file header pins it to inline-style mode (see packages/grand-idea/src/ui-component.tsx). Where the brief's literal FSM-state names diverge from canonical (`proposal-in-progress`, `external-design-uploaded`), the implementation uses the canonical edge per packages/state-machine/dist/transitions.js (interview-complete → information-architecture-in-progress → ... → proposal-generated → awaiting-external-design → design-uploaded → ticket-tree-generated → atlas-ready). Operator should run a live submitPlan against @caia/ea-architect before True-Zero admin-merge.
requested_modifications: Operator: run live submitPlan against @caia/ea-architect before True-Zero admin-merge.
Wave 2: swap MemoryBlobStorage for the BYOC R2/S3/GCS adapter once the cloud config lands in @caia/onboarding.
Wave 2: swap MemoryProposalPersistence for PgProposalPersistence once per-tenant business_proposals/designapp_prompts tables are migrated.
Wave 2: replace ScriptedLlmCaller with DefaultLlmCaller (claude-spawner) once the subscription-only constraint is verified end-to-end in CI.
Wave 2: wire @caia/design-ingest Ingestor full dispatch (adapters + GDPR coordinator) once design-app-prompt → upload flow is settled.
Wave 2: replace the createMockClient fixture in Step 7 with the live atlas backend client once the design-ingest pipeline materializes ticket trees.

reuseSearchResults.reason: Every primitive (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, Button, Input, Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent, Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent, Badge, Progress, ScrollArea, Sheet, Form). No raw shadcn/Radix imports.
ProjectState + canTransition used to gate FSM PATCH dispatch from the wizard pages; no parallel FSM.
Step 1 engine + 19 categories. The wizard page mounts a 'use client' form that walks the category catalog and POSTs per-category submissions; FSM advance fires when the engine reports ready=true.

GrandIdeaForm from @caia/grand-idea/ui-component used verbatim; advanceToIdeaCaptured semantics fired via PATCH state route. No extra shadcn wrapper around the form per its inline-styles design header.

runStep5 imported server-side in /api/wizard/proposal/generate. MemoryBlobStorage + MemoryProposalPersistence + ScriptedLlmCaller used for the V1 wizard handler so the route is deterministic without pandoc / live cloud.
Step 6 design upload Dialog surfaces the @caia/design-ingest contract types; full adapter dispatch is Wave 2.
AtlasShell + DesignPane + TicketPane + PromptDock + SelectionBreadcrumb composed in Step 7; createMockClient + fixtures back the V1 wizard render so the page works without a live atlas backend.
createAtlasPromptApiHandler used inside /api/wizard/atlas/[projectId]/prompt to validate + classify the per-element prompt submission.
Step 4 ships on a sibling PR (the IA agent PR #594 follow-up).
Step 3 ships on a sibling PR (PR #596).
V1 wizard route uses ScriptedLlmCaller for deterministic dev/test responses; live spawner swap is Wave 2.
No event publication in these wizard pages; FSM transitions already publish via the existing route handler from PR #601.
Onboarding step's credential storage is V1-stubbed; secrets adapter wiring is Wave 2.
Used by architect packages, not by per-step customer UI.
Wave 1 uses console.error for failure paths to match the shell PR's choice.
Wave 1 uses thrown Error instances. Wave 2 will adopt the typed hierarchy.
useWizardState already uses SWR from PR #601; reused here when a page needs the project's current state.
